title: Can you see Earth's shadow?
summary: Earth's shadow follows the planet as it orbits the sun. You can get a sense of its enormous, awe-inspiring size by seeing this silhouette cast on objects ranging from satellites to the moon.

title: 'A collision within a collision': Neutron star merger hiding in mini-galaxy could answer 2 big astrophysics questions
